# Output

`subgraph.output` · Utility

Marks a field a subgraph hands out: each one becomes an output port on the container.

## Purpose

Marks a field a subgraph hands out. Placed inside a subgraph, each Output node becomes an output port on the containing Subgraph node.

## Inputs

- `in`

## Outputs

This node produces no outputs.

## Parameters

This node has no parameters.

## Layer contract

Reads and writes the height layer.
